item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Is "hobo" an acceptable term for a clinical document? I was under the impression that the word was derogatory. Maybe instead, "SCP-4489 is a small, carved wooden statue resembling a caricature of a homeless man."

item.title: Original Author Record
item.content:encoded: Noting that the author of 089-arc, upon which this was based, was Kain Pathos Crow.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I feel personally called out by this. I expect an apology.

item.title: Sorry for my wrong edit
item.content:encoded:
sorry for the wrong edit I made!
I was translating this article into Chinese but saved it in the wrong page! The page has been reverted, sorry for my neglect.

Effected by this Skip indeed

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this as is (and already +1) but I wouldn't mind seeing a few more testing logs. How does it affect animals? Could this be used for interrogation (subject in the room with the interrogator talking to them over intercom)? I agree with thefran that sociopaths would also be an interesting test.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: there's really not much to it. what does "often" mean? does it just not work on some people, and if yes, on whom? are sociopaths not affected? if some people don't ever recover, what does it look like? what are the lingering effects?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Upvote for being funny, but this will be rescinded immediately until you apologize for hiding this thing somewhere in my home for the past several years, which is definitely the reason why I'm a chronic apologizer and not the anxiety.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this. It is wholesome and funny. They kept apologizing for every single thing they make. You can like use this like in a war or like a fight. That would be awesome. This SCP technically restores peace and harmony. +1 to you cactus.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was going to make the exact same joke, damnit.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A simple idea executed brilliantly. I was already laughing with the first test logs, but the final one was just hilarious.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This goes up to the line between main list and -J and proceeds to tarantella all *over* that line. +1, and I'm terribly sorry that's all I can vote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Is this……An SCP that make you canadian!?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
PLEASE, PLEASE LET ME APOLOGIZE FOR SHOULDERING YOU WITH THIS INSURMOUNTABLE AND MISPLACED SELF-DOUBT. I AM THE ONE WITH THE HIDEOUS FACE.

Upvoted right about here. Good stuff, kaktus, I laughed my ass off.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I still can't believe you made 089-ARC funny. Props to you kaktus.

+1

item.title: Hopefully this doesn't get -200 votes.
item.content:encoded:
This is a rewrite of 089-ARC. I don't think that article was great, so hopefully this is better. Written and posted with permission from Modern_Erasmus.

Thanks to a handful of bros for looking this over. I hope you like it!
